Manage bookings. Collect payments. Keep more of your income.

The simple booking and payment tool for holiday rental owners. Your guests pay via Stripe — no app, no account, no fuss. And you only pay when you take bookings.

Get Started Free See Pricing →

Payments powered by

|

Zero guest fees • No subscription required

How It Works

Three simple steps to managing your bookings and collecting payments.

1

Create a Booking

Add your guest’s details, set the dates, and define a payment schedule — deposit and balance, or custom instalments.

2

Guest Receives a Link

Your guest gets an email with a link to their booking page. No app to download, no account to create — they just click and pay.

3

Payments Handled Automatically

We send reminders, process payments via Stripe, and email receipts. You track everything from your dashboard.

Built Different

No complexity. No hidden costs. Just a fair tool that works for you.

No Subscription Fees

Pay only when you take bookings. Just 1% of the booking value, with a minimum of £10 and a cap of £25. No monthly charges, ever.

Zero Guest Fees

Your guests pay nothing extra. No service fees, no booking fees, no hidden charges. The price you quote is the price they pay.

Every Feature Included

No tiers. No paywalls. No per-property charges. Every feature is available to every user from day one.

Automated Payment Reminders

Set your payment schedule and let us handle the rest. We send reminders at the right time so you don’t have to chase guests.

Everything You Need

Purpose-built tools for managing direct bookings and collecting payments.

Booking Management

Create bookings, set payment schedules, and send professional confirmation emails automatically.

Guest Portal

Guests access their booking via email link. No app, no account, no password — they just click and pay.

Payment Processing

Stripe-powered payments with cards, bank transfers, and Apple Pay. Automated reminders and email receipts.

OTA Savings Dashboard

See exactly how much you’re saving compared to Airbnb and other OTA commission fees, in real time.

Simple, Fair Pricing

No subscription. No per-property fees. Just pay a small fee when you take bookings.

1% per booking • £10 minimum • £25 cap
See Full Pricing Details

Ready to manage your bookings smarter?

Join holiday rental owners who are taking control of their bookings and keeping more of their income.
